summary: Tested Calendar module with Convocation Status feature. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Calendar page loads, event type filters work, dropdown menu with 'Ver Estado Convocatória' option opens correctly, Convocation Status dialog displays player lists grouped by status (Present/Absent/Pending), PlayerStatusRow component allows changing player status via dropdown, status changes persist and update UI with success toast.

calendar_page.description: Calendar page loads with events displayed in month/week/day views

event_type_filters.description: Filters for Treino, Jogo Campeonato, Jogo Amigável, Torneio, Outro visible and functional

get_convocation_status_endpoint.description: GET /api/events/{event_id}/convocation-status returns correct structure with present/absent/pending arrays

send_reminder_endpoint.description: POST /api/events/{event_id}/send-reminder sends reminders to pending players

event_dropdown_menu.description: Event cards have dropdown menu with options: Editar, Convocar Jogadores, Ver Estado Convocatória, Adiar, Cancelar, Eliminar

convocation_status_dialog.description: Dialog opens via 'Ver Estado Convocatória' menu option, shows summary cards (Present/Absent/Pending counts)

player_status_row_component.description: PlayerStatusRow displays player info (name, jersey number, avatar) with status dropdown

change_player_status.description: Clicking status dropdown shows options (Present/Absent/Pending), selecting updates status with success toast

send_reminder_button.description: Send reminder button visible in dialog when pending players exist

endpoints_tested: GET /api/events/{event_id}/convocation-status - Returns player lists grouped by status
POST /api/events/{event_id}/send-reminder - Sends reminders to pending players

frontend_verification.calendar_page: PASS - Loads with events, filters, and navigation
frontend_verification.day_view: PASS - Shows events with time and location
frontend_verification.event_dropdown: PASS - Menu appears on hover with all options
frontend_verification.convocation_dialog: PASS - Opens with summary cards and player lists
frontend_verification.status_change: PASS - Dropdown works, API called, UI updates with toast

critical_code_review_comments: Convocation status endpoints properly validate user permissions (admin/coach only for updates)
PlayerStatusRow component correctly uses Select component with status options
Dialog properly handles empty state (no players) with 'Create Convocation' button
Status updates trigger immediate UI refresh via state management
Send reminder button only visible when pending players exist
seed_data_creation: Used existing Treino event on March 3, 2026 with 9 players for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Calendar module with Convocation Status feature fully tested. All backend endpoints work (GET/PUT convocation-status, POST send-reminder). Frontend dialog opens via event dropdown menu, shows player lists grouped by status, allows status changes with immediate UI update. 15 pytest tests pass. No issues found.

mocked_apis.resend_email: MOCKED - Resend email API uses placeholder key (re_XXXXXXXX)
